mainEntity.name: What is the correct age to get orthodontic treatment?

acceptedAnswer.text: Orthodontic correction can be performed at any age. The American Association of Orthodontists recommends a child's first screening by age 7, but adult corrections are highly successful using modern cosmetic solutions like clear aligners.

mainEntity.name: How much does Invisalign cost in Nagpur?

acceptedAnswer.text: The cost of Invisalign clear aligners depends on the complexity of alignment needed and duration. We offer flexible zero-interest monthly installment plans to make clear aligner treatments affordable.

Clear aligners apply controlled gentle pressure to reposition teeth. Some initial tightness is expected on wearing a new tray set, but it is highly comfortable and does not irritate oral tissues compared to metal brackets.

mainEntity.name: How long does the braces treatment usually take?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most standard orthodontic corrections take between 12 to 24 months. Mild spacing or crowding cases using clear aligners can often be successfully completed in 6 to 9 months.
